name: Centuria Office Reit
analysis: COF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.9350, stop A$0.8662, target A$1.0612 (1.84:1) — then trail it.
